CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INT, ts TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT id, ts FROM timestamps WHERE ts > make_timestamptz(0) AND ts < make_timestamptz(1667810584123456);
CREATE TABLE test_dates AS SELECT make_timestamptz(microseconds) AS tz WHERE microseconds IN (1667810584123456, 1667810584123457);
WITH example AS (SELECT make_timestamptz(1667810584123456) AS ts1, make_timestamptz(1667810584123457) AS ts2) SELECT ts1, ts2 FROM example WHERE ts2 > ts1;
CREATE TABLE date_range AS SELECT make_timestamptz(t.microseconds) AS ts FROM (SELECT seq(0, 1000000) AS microseconds) t;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM date_range WHERE ts BETWEEN make_timestamptz(0) AND make_timestamptz(1667810584123456);
SELECT DISTINCT ts FROM (SELECT make_timestamptz(1667810584123456) AS ts UNION SELECT make_timestamptz(1667810584123455) AS ts) AS unioned_dates;
CREATE TABLE time_comparison AS SELECT id, ts, (make_timestamptz(1667810584123456) - ts) AS diff FROM timestamps WHERE ts IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, ts FROM timestamps ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 5;
